overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy, overcast prairie landscape alongside railroad tracks. The character crosses the tracks and continues on a dirt path toward distant ranch buildings, encountering a horse rider near the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railroad corridor through prairie grassland

events.description: character crosses the railroad tracks from right to left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy path beside the railroad tracks, approaching and crossing over them

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks with wooden ties running parallel to the path
wooden utility poles with crossbars and electrical wires lining the route
tall yellow-brown autumn grass covering the open fields
tall yellow-brown autumn grass covering the open fields
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon under overcast skies
dense evergreen forest lining the distant right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path parallel to railroad tracks in an open prairie landscape. Telephone poles line the right side while mountains loom in the distance. The character crosses the tracks around the 18-second mark, transitioning from the railway corridor onto a dirt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt road approaching ranch settlement

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path away from the railroad toward distant ranch buildings

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop and boulders on the left side of the path
cluster of wooden ranch buildings and corrals visible in the distance
single large deciduous tree standing alone in the prairie
weathered wooden signpost with directional arm beside the road

segments.scene_description: Having left the railroad behind, the character traverses an open prairie dirt road. A large rock formation dominates the left side while ranch buildings grow larger in the distance. The character passes a wooden signpost as the telephone poles recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie crossroads with approaching horse rider

events.description: rider on horseback enters from the right and passes ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as a horse rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback entering from right and riding ahead on the path in the same direction

segments.scene_description: A rider on horseback suddenly enters from the right, passing the character and riding ahead along the dirt path. The ranch buildings remain visible ahead while the rock formation and solitary tree fall behind. The prairie stretches out in all directions under the gray overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie landscape that shifts from a railway corridor to a rural dirt road leading toward distant ranch buildings. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path parallel to railroad tracks, with telephone poles lining the way and mountains looming in the distance. As the character crosses the tracks, the scene opens up onto a wide dirt road where a large rock formation dominates the left side and the railway recedes. The camera then follows the character past a wooden signpost as the ranch buildings grow larger in the distance and the telephone poles disappear from view. Finally, a rider on horseback enters from the right and gallops ahead along the path, leaving a solitary tree behind as the prairie stretches out under a gray overcast sky.
